SEARCH
Package io.github.kirstenali.deepj.tensor

Interface TensorBackend

All Known Implementing Classes:
CpuBackend, MetalBackend
public interface TensorBackend

      void adamWUpdate(Tensor w, Tensor g, Tensor mt, Tensor vt, float lr, float beta1, float beta2, float eps, float weightDecay, float bc1, float bc2)
      In-place AdamW update. Mutates w, mt, vt.

    • scatterAddRows

      void scatterAddRows(Tensor target, int[] indices, Tensor grad)
      Scatter-add: target.data[indices[i]] += grad.data[i] (for embedding backward).

      default void negInPlace(Tensor a)

    • logInPlace

      default void logInPlace(Tensor a)

    • reluInPlace

      default void reluInPlace(Tensor a)

    • geluInPlace

      default void geluInPlace(Tensor a)

    • tanhInPlace

      default void tanhInPlace(Tensor a)

    • sigmoidInPlace

      default void sigmoidInPlace(Tensor a)

    • materializeTensor

      default void materializeTensor(Tensor t)
      Materialize a tensor: flush any pending GPU computation and download the result to the tensor's CPU data[]. Default is a no-op (for CpuBackend).

    • releaseResources

      default void releaseResources()
      Release backend-owned resources (GPU buffers, native handles, etc.). Default is a no-op for backends without external resources.
